prediabetes.reason: Directly spikes blood glucose levels and increases insulin resistance.

hypertriglyceridemia.reason: Can significantly raise serum triglyceride levels and arterial risk.

hyperlipidemia.reason: May further elevate LDL (bad) cholesterol levels.

low_hdl.reason: Directly contributes to lower protective (HDL) cholesterol levels.

hypertension.reason: High sodium and saturated fats elevate blood pressure.

iron_deficiency_anemia.reason: Tannins and polyphenols may inhibit non-heme iron absorption.

kidney_strain.reason: Increases filtration workload and potential waste buildup.

liver_stress.reason: Directly induces hepatic inflammation and fat accumulation.

high_uric_acid.reason: High purine content may trigger joint inflammation and gout.

thyroid_issues.reason: Goitrogens may interfere with iodine uptake in thyroid tissue.

hypocalcemia.reason: May interfere with intestinal calcium absorption and bone health.

vitamin_d_deficiency.reason: Sunlight is critical for precursor conversion (Vitamin D synthesis).

protein_deficiency.reason: Lacks the essential amino acid substrate for muscle repair.

hyperglycemia.reason: Directly spikes blood glucose levels and exacerbates metabolic stress.

iron.protocol: Consume iron-rich foods with citric acid sources to maximize non-heme bioavailability.

calcium.protocol: Ensure synergistic Vitamin D levels for intestinal calcium absorption.

vitamin_b12.protocol: B12 and Folate synergy is critical for DNA synthesis and RBC maturation.

protein.protocol: B6 is a key co-factor in amino acid metabolism and nitrogen balance.
